[Mini Retractors](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/mini-retractor) 5. Mini Retractor Kit # Mini Retractor Banner Stand Combo - 16" x 8" The Mini Retractor is a tabletop display that features a permanently attached shock-corded support pole. When you are ready to retract the graphic, the pole folds down into the base. There are no parts to lose and the base protects your graphic as you move it from place to place. ![Mini Retractor with 16x8 Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/cf8906417aee497081d70b41f0b3b231.jpg) Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Retractors Product: with Mini Retractor Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 16" x 8" 16" x 8" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Stands Music Stands Political Stands Real Estate Stands Restaurant Stands Sales Stands Sports Stands Sportsman Stands Trade Show Stands Wedding Stands Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ The Mini Retractor is a tabletop display that features a permanently attached shock-corded support pole. When you are ready to retract the graphic, the pole folds down into the base. There are no parts to lose and the base protects your graphic as you move it from place to place. [Create Your Product](#cust) #### [Material](#materialCollapse) ### Mini Retractor Banner Stand Combo with 16" X 8" Banner Material With this product, you will receive the banner retractor hardware and a 16" x 8" banner. #### Matieral Option: • **13 oz Vinyl**: Our most standard banner material, rated for both indoor and outdoor use. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. [Click here to request a free sample packet of materials.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request "Sample Packet Request") #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines.
